identity.name: Vegsoft Solutions
identity.mission: Transmit security, specialty, and technical capability for business digitalization.

headings.description: Geometric, modern, and tech-forward without being aggressive.

body.description: Clean, highly readable, works well for technical content.

mono.description: For code snippets and technical details.

services_bento.description: Asymmetric grid for services. Mix of 1x1, 2x1, and 2x2 cards.

hero_layout.description: Split screen: Typography on left (60%), 3D/Abstract Visual on right (40%).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-all hover:scale-105 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,220,130,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: border border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all

cards.service_card: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-border/50 bg-card/50 p-6 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300
cards.glass_panel: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl

inputs.default: bg-gray-900/50 border-gray-800 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-lg

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5 bg-background/80

content_strategy.voice: Authoritative yet accessible. Focus on 'Transformation' and 'Efficiency'.

headlines.hero: Transformamos tu negocio con Software e IA
headlines.contact: Hablemos de tu próximo gran proyecto

universal_guidelines: Use deep blacks (#030712) instead of pure black for backgrounds to reduce eye strain and increase richness.
Interactive elements MUST have a hover state that brightens or glows.
Use 'Outfit' font for all headings to maintain brand character.
Do NOT use gradients on text unless it's a very large headline.
Use 2x more padding than you think is necessary.
Ensure the Language Selector is visible in the Header.
WhatsApp button must be floating fixed at bottom-right.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' fonts using Google Fonts or similar.
Set up the Tailwind config with the specified colors and border radius.
Create the Hero section with the 'Electric' abstract background image.
Build the Services section using a Bento Grid layout.
Implement the Contact form with email sending capability.
Ensure the client logos are displayed in a clean, grayscale-to-color hover carousel.
Use the 'sonner' library for toast notifications.
